note: SNR/SDR are tiled vs procedural ideal. No PESQ/STOI. Families are Python generative stand-ins spanning harmonic/AM-FM/nonlinear/overlay/open-wrap variants of make_batch (not a 1:1 Rust sound_bench port). Ablations are branch-best freezes from the 5k-gate history, not isolated re-runs.

compute_budget.note: Arch evaluations ≈ clean search iterations (one fitted proposal per iter). Peak mem from this bench process is not overnight peak; overnight peak not logged — report GPU model + hours + eval count as primary budget.
